description: Accounts written by a government official indicating sums owed by someone, probably for Abū l-[...] al-ʿAfṣī, on various dates, arranged in two columns. Needs further examination. (Information partly from Goitein's index card).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
